statements.select:
select distinct GRPID from CLAMROLE where EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND# and ROLE=#ROLE#
and GRPID in ($GRPID$)
order by GRPID

SELECT DISTINCT OPCD,OPCHNF FROM EXAMUNIT WHERE EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND#
AND ROLE='11'
AND ROLE='12'
AND 1 <> 1
AND ROLE='1'
AND ROLE='21'
AND ROLE='22'
AND 1<>1
AND ROLE='1'
AND ROLE='1'
AND (ROLE='21' OR ROLE='22')
AND ROLE='32'
AND 1<>1
AND ROLE='1'
AND 1<>1
AND OPCD LIKE #OPCD# || '%'
AND OPCHNF LIKE '%' || #OPCHNF# || '%'
ORDER BY OPCD

select distinct OPCD,OPCHNF from EXAMUNIT where EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND#
and OPCD like #OPCD#||'%'
and OPCHNF like '%'||#OPCHNF#||'%'
and OPCHNF like '%'||#OPCHNF#||'%'
and OPCHNF like '%'||#OPCHNF#||'%'
order by OPCD

select OPCD,max(OPCHNF) as OPCHNF from EXAMUNIT where EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND#
and ROLE in ('1','2')
and ROLE in ('1','2') and OPCD='0000'
and ROLE in ('1','2')
and ROLE in ('1','2') and OPCD='0000'
and ROLE=decode(#DISTRICT2#,'1','21','2','22','')
and ROLE=decode(#DISTRICT2#,'1','21','2','22','')
and ROLE='11'
and ROLE='12'
and ROLE='21' and OPCD='0000'
and ROLE='22' and OPCD='0000'
and OPCD='0000'
and OPCD='0000'
and OPCD='0000'
and OPCD='0000'
and OPCD='0000'
and OPCD='0000'
and OPCD='0000'
and OPCD='0000'
and OPCD='0000'
and OPCD like #OPCD#||'%'
and OPCHNF like '%'||#OPCHNF#||'%'
group by OPCD order by OPCD

select distinct OPCD,OPCHNF from EXAMUNIT where EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND# and ROLE=decode(EXAMKIND,'1','32','3','32','1')
and OPCD like #OPCD#||'%'
and OPCHNF like '%'||#OPCHNF#||'%'
order by OPCD

select USERNO,USERNAME,UNITID from CLAMDBURM where 1 = 1
and AUTHSTATUS = '1'
and AUTHSTATUS = '1' and UNITID=#UNITID#
and UNITID=#UNITID#
and USERNO like #USERNO#||'%'
and USERNAME like '%'||#USERNAME#||'%'
order by USERNO

select USERNO,USERNAME,UNITID from CLAMDBURM where 1 = 1
and AUTHSTATUS = '1'
and AUTHSTATUS = '1' and UNITID=#UNITID#
and UNITID=#UNITID#
and USERNO >= #Keyword#
and USERNO <= #Keyword#
and USERNO like '%'||#Keyword#||'%'
and USERNO <> #Keyword#
and USERNAME >= #Keyword#
and USERNAME <= #Keyword#
and USERNAME like '%'||#Keyword#||'%'
and USERNAME <> #Keyword#
order by USERNO

SELECT OPCD, OPCHNF, OPKIND, ZIP, ADDR, CEO, CEOTITLE, CONTACT, TEL, FAX, EMAIL, HIST FROM CLAMOPUNIT WHERE 1 = 1
AND OPCD LIKE #OPCD# || '%'
AND OPCHNF LIKE '%' || #OPCHNF# || '%'
ORDER BY OPCD

select distinct SUBUNIT,SUBUNITN from CLAMUNIT where UNITID=#UNITID#
and SUBUNIT like #SUBUNIT#||'%'
and SUBUNITN like '%'||#SUBUNITN#||'%'
order by SUBUNIT

select distinct GRPID,GRPNAME from CLAMGRP where 1 = 1
and GRPID >= #Keyword#
and GRPID <= #Keyword#
and GRPID like '%'||#Keyword#||'%'
and GRPID <> #Keyword#
and GRPNAME >= #Keyword#
and GRPNAME <= #Keyword#
and GRPNAME like '%'||#Keyword#||'%'
and GRPNAME <> #Keyword#
order by GRPID

select distinct EXAMKIND,ROLE,ROLEN from CLAMROLE where 1=1
and EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND#
and ROLE like #ROLE#||'%'
and ROLEN like '%'||#ROLEN#||'%'
and (EXAMKIND<>' ' and EXAMKIND is not null) order by EXAMKIND,ROLE

select a.PLACEC,a.PLACEN,a.PLACETYPE,c.UNAME as PLACETYPENAME, a.CITY as ZIP,(a.CITY||' '||b.ZIPNAME) as ZIPNAME,a.CADR,a.OTEL from (select distinct PLACEC,PLACEN,PLACETYPE,OTEL,CITY,CADR from CLAMPLACE where OPCD=#OPCD#
and PLACETYPE=#PLACETYPE#
and PLACEC like #PLACEC#||'%'
and PLACEN like '%'||#PLACEN#||'%'
) a left join CLAMCITY b on b.zipcode = a.CITY left join CLAMUNITKIND c on c.ukind = a.PLACETYPE order by a.PLACEC

select OPCD as CODE,OPCHN as TEXT from (select distinct OPCD,OPCD||' '||OPCHN as OPCHN from CLAMOPUNIT where 1=1
and OPCD not in ($InSqlOPCD$)
and OPCD in ($InSqlOPCD$)
) order by OPCD

select CODE,(CODE||' '||TEXT) as TEXT from (select distinct OPCD,PLACEC as CODE,PLACEN as TEXT from CLAMPLACE where OPCD in ($InSqlOPCD$)
and PLACEC not in ($InSqlPLACEC$)
and PLACEC in ($InSqlPLACEC$)
) order by OPCD,CODE

select CITYCODE as CODE,(CITYCODE||' '||CITYNAME) as TEXT from (select distinct CITYCODE,CITYNAME from CLAMCITY where 1=1
and CITYCODE not in ($InSqlCITYCODE$)
and CITYCODE in ($InSqlCITYCODE$)
) order by CITYCODE

SELECT ZIPCODE AS CODE,(ZIPCODE||' '||ZIPNAME) AS TEXT FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ZIPCODE,ZIPNAME FROM CLAMCITY WHERE 1=1
AND ZIPCODE NOT IN ($InSqlZIPCODE$)
AND ZIPCODE IN ($InSqlZIPCODE$)
) ORDER BY ZIPCODE

select distinct PNO as CODE,(PNO||' '||NAME) as TEXT from PROF a where 1=1
and PNO in (select distinct PNO from YRREGULATE where EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND# and YR=#YR# and STP=#STP# and JOBTYPE='1')
and PNO in ( SELECT CASE WHEN MAJ.PNO is not null THEN MAJ.PNO ELSE TRIM(P.COLUMN_VALUE) END AS PNO FROM XMLTABLE(('"' || REPLACE(#PNOINC#, ',', '","') || '"')) P LEFT JOIN PRFMAGEJ SEQ ON SEQ.PNO=TRIM(P.COLUMN_VALUE) LEFT JOIN PRFMAGEJ MAJ ON MAJ.PROFSEQ=SEQ.PROFSEQ )
and PNO not in ($InSqlPNO$)
and PNO in ($InSqlPNO$)
order by PNO

SELECT DISTINCT SKT1.PNO || '~' || SKT1.EGR || '~' || trim(SKT1.DSTNG) AS CODE ,SKT1.PNO|| SKT1.EGR || trim(SKT1.DSTNG) || ' ' ||PROF.NAME||EGR.DESCR||DSTNG.DESCR AS TEXT FROM SKT1 LEFT JOIN PROF ON SKT1.PNO=PROF.PNO LEFT JOIN CODE1 EGR ON SKT1.EGR=EGR.CODE AND EGR.ITEM='EGR' LEFT JOIN CODE1 DSTNG ON SKT1.DSTNG=DSTNG.CODE AND DSTNG.ITEM='DSTNG' WHERE 1=1 AND SKT1.DSTNG <> 'A' AND SKT1.EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND# AND SKT1.YR=#YR# AND SKT1.STP =#STP# AND SKT1.WOPCD =#OPCD#
and SKT1.PNO not in ($InSqlPNO$)
and SKT1.PNO in ($InSqlPNO$)
ORDER BY CODE

select OPCD as CODE,(OPCD||' '||OPCHNF) as TEXT from (select distinct OPCD,OPCHNF from EXAMUNIT where 1=1
and EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND# and ROLE=#ROLE#
and OPCD not in ($InSqlOPCD$)
and OPCD in ($InSqlOPCD$)
) order by OPCD

select distinct SNO as CODE,(SNO||' '||SNAME) as TEXT from PRFITEM where 1 = 1
and PNO = #PNO#
and EGR = #EGR#
and SNO not in ($InSqlSNO$)
and SNO in ($InSqlSNO$)
order by SNO

select distinct SUBUNIT as CODE,(SUBUNIT||' '||SUBUNITN) as TEXT from CLAMUNIT where UNITID = #UNITID#
and SUBUNIT not in ($InSqlUNITID$)
and SUBUNIT in ($InSqlUNITID$)
order by SUBUNIT

select distinct SYS_ID as CODE,(SYS_ID||' '||PRGNAME) as TEXT from CLAMFUNCM where MODULES=' ' and SUBMODULES=' ' and PRGID=' '
and SYS_ID not in ($InSqlSYSID$)
and SYS_ID in ($InSqlSYSID$)
order by SYS_ID

select distinct CODE,(CODE||' '||PRGNAME) as TEXT from (select (SYS_ID||'-'||MODULES) AS CODE,PRGNAME from CLAMFUNCM where MODULES<>' ' and SUBMODULES=' ' and PRGID=' '
and SYS_ID in ($InSqlSYSID$)
) where 1 = 1
and CODE not in ($InSqlMODULES$)
and CODE in ($InSqlMODULES$)
order by CODE

select distinct CODE,(CODE||' '||PRGNAME) as TEXT from (select SYSMOD,CODE,PRGNAME from (select (SYS_ID||'-'||MODULES) AS SYSMOD,(SYS_ID||'-'||MODULES||'-'||SUBMODULES) AS CODE,PRGNAME from CLAMFUNCM where MODULES<>' ' and SUBMODULES<>' ' and PRGID=' '
and SYS_ID in ($InSqlSYSID$)
) ) where 1 = 1
and SYSMOD in ($InSqlMODULES$)
and CODE not in ($InSqlSUBMODULES$)
and CODE in ($InSqlSUBMODULES$)
order by CODE

select CITYCODE,MAX(CITYNAME) as CITYNAME from CLAMCITY where 1 = 1
and CITYCODE like #CITYCODE#||'%'
and CITYNAME like '%'||#CITYNAME#||'%'
group by AREANO,CITYCODE order by AREANO,CITYCODE

SELECT DISTINCT PNO,NAME FROM PROF WHERE 1 = 1
AND PNO LIKE #PNO# || '%'
AND NAME LIKE '%' || #NAME# || '%'
ORDER BY PNO

select distinct PNO,NAME from PROF where PNO in (select PNO from PRFMAGEJ where PROFSEQ in (select PROFSEQ from PRFMAGEJ where PNO=#CrossPNO#))
and PNO like '%'||#PNO#||'%'
and NAME like '%'||#NAME#||'%'
order by PNO

select a.PNO,a.PNONAME,a.EGR,(a.EGR||' '||b.DESCR) as EGRNAME, a.DSTNG,(a.DSTNG||' '||c.DESCR) as DSTNGNAME,a.AENO,a.IDNO,a.NAME from (select distinct a.PNO,b.NAME AS PNONAME,a.EGR,a.DSTNG,a.IDNO,a.AENO,a.NAME from SKT1 a left join PROF b on b.PNO=a.PNO where a.EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND# and a.YR=#YR# and a.STP=#STP#
and a.SOPCD=#SOPCD#
and a.OOPCD=#OOPCD#
and a.WOPCD=#WOPCD#
and a.PNO like #PNO#||'%'
and a.EGR=#EGR#
and a.DSTNG=#DSTNG#
) a left join CODE1 b on b.ITEM='EGR' and b.CODE=a.EGR left join CODE1 c on c.ITEM='DSTNG' and c.CODE=a.DSTNG order by a.PNO,a.EGR,a.DSTNG,a.AENO

isParameterPresent.isEqual:
select OPCD,OPCHNF from (select distinct SOPCD as OPCD,b.OPCHNF from SKT1 a left join CLAMOPUNIT b ON b.OPCD=a.SOPCD where a.EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND# and a.YR=#YR# and a.STP=#STP# and a.OOPCD<>' '
and a.SOPCD like #OPCD#||'%'
and b.OPCHNF like '%'||#OPCHNF#||'%'
) order by OPCD

select OPCD,OPCHNF from (select distinct a.OOPCD as OPCD,b.OPCHNF from SKT1 a left join CLAMOPUNIT b ON b.OPCD=a.OOPCD where a.EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND# and a.YR=#YR# and a.STP=#STP# and a.OOPCD<>' '
and a.OOPCD like #OPCD#||'%'
and b.OPCHNF like '%'||#OPCHNF#||'%'
) order by OPCD

select.isEqual:
select ORGID,ORGIDCHNS from (select distinct a.SOPCD,a.ORGID,b.ORGIDCHNS from SKT1 a inner join ORGID b on b.ORGID=a.ORGID where a.EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND# and a.YR=#YR# and a.STP=#STP# and a.SOPCD=#OPCD#
) order by SOPCD,ORGID

select ORGID,ORGIDCHNS from (select distinct a.OOPCD,a.ORGID,b.ORGIDCHNS from SKT1 a inner join ORGID b on b.ORGID=a.ORGID where a.EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND# and a.YR=#YR# and a.STP=#STP# and a.OOPCD=#OPCD#
) order by OOPCD,ORGID

statements.select:
select distinct OWNERNO,OWNERNAME from PRFOWNER where EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND#
and PNO=#PNO#
and OWNERNO like #OWNERNO#||'%'
and OWNERNAME like '%'||#OWNERNAME#||'%'
order by OWNERNO

select AREANO, AREANAME from AREADATA where EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND# and YR=#YR# and STP=#STP# and AREATYPE=#AREATYPE# and OPCD=#OPCD# and LSHYN='Y'
and AREANO=#AREANO#
and AREANAME like '%'||#AREANAME#||'%'
order by EXAMKIND,YR,STP,OPCD,AREANO

select distinct AREANO, AREANAME from AREADATA where 1=1
and EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND#
and EXAMKIND<>#ExcludeEXAMKIND#
and YR=#YR# and STP=#STP# and OPCD=#OPCD#
and AREATYPE = #AREATYPE#
and AREANO >= #Keyword#
and AREANO <= #Keyword#
and AREANO like '%'||#Keyword#||'%'
and AREANO <> #Keyword#
and AREANAME >= #Keyword#
and AREANAME <= #Keyword#
and AREANAME like '%'||#Keyword#||'%'
and AREANAME <> #Keyword#
order by AREANO

select distinct ROOMNO, ROOMNAME from AREAROOMMAIN where 1=1
and EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND#
and EXAMKIND<>#ExcludeEXAMKIND#
and YR=#YR# and STP=#STP# and OPCD=#OPCD# and AREANO=#AREANO#
and AREATYPE = #AREATYPE#
and ROOMNO >= #Keyword#
and ROOMNO <= #Keyword#
and ROOMNO like '%'||#Keyword#||'%'
and ROOMNO <> #Keyword#
and ROOMNAME >= #Keyword#
and ROOMNAME <= #Keyword#
and ROOMNAME like '%'||#Keyword#||'%'
and ROOMNAME <> #Keyword#
order by ROOMNO

select distinct DISTID, DISTNAME from AREADIST where 1=1
and EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND#
and EXAMKIND<>#ExcludeEXAMKIND#
and YR=#YR# and STP=#STP# and OPCD=#OPCD# and AREANO=#AREANO# and ROOMNO=#ROOMNO#
and AREATYPE = #AREATYPE#
and DISTID >= #Keyword#
and DISTID <= #Keyword#
and DISTID like '%'||#Keyword#||'%'
and DISTID <> #Keyword#
and DISTNAME >= #Keyword#
and DISTNAME <= #Keyword#
and DISTNAME like '%'||#Keyword#||'%'
and DISTNAME <> #Keyword#
order by DISTID

select distinct AREANO,ROOMNO,DISTID,DISTNAME,EXDATE from AREADIST where EXAMKIND = #EXAMKIND# and YR = #YR# and STP = #STP# and AREATYPE = #AREATYPE# and OPCD = #OPCD#
and AREATYPE = #AREATYPE#
and DISTNAME >= #Keyword#
and DISTNAME <= #Keyword#
and DISTNAME like '%'||#Keyword#||'%'
and DISTNAME <> #Keyword#
and EXDATE >= #Keyword#
and EXDATE <= #Keyword#
and EXDATE like '%'||#Keyword#||'%'
and EXDATE <> #Keyword#
order by EXAMKIND,YR,STP,OPCD,AREANO,ROOMNO,DISTID,EXDATE

select a.EXAMKIND,a.EXAMKINDNAME, a.AREANO,a.ROOMNO,a.DISTID,a.AREANAME,a.ROOMNAME,a.DISTNAME, listagg(to_char(a.COUNTS),'
') within group (order by a.PNO,a.EGR,a.DSTNG) as COUNTS, listagg(to_char(a.PNONAME),'
') within group (order by a.PNO) as PNONAME, listagg(to_char(a.EGRNAME),'
') within group (order by a.EGR) as EGRNAME, listagg(to_char(a.DSTNGNAME),'
') within group (order by a.DSTNG) as DSTNGNAME, to_char(a.CAPACITY) as CAPACITY,a.EXDATE,a.PNOINC,a.EGRINC,' ' as DFlag,a.AREADISTID from (select a.EXAMKIND,h.CHN as EXAMKINDNAME, a.AREANO,b.AREANAME,a.ROOMNO,c.ROOMNAME,a.DISTID,a.DISTNAME,a.EXDATE,d.PNO,e.NAME as PNONAME, d.EGR,f.DESCR as EGRNAME,d.DSTNG,g.DESCR as DSTNGNAME, count(d.PNO) as COUNTS,c.CAPACITY, a.PNOINC,a.EGRINC,a.AREADISTID from AREADIST a left join AREADATA b on b.EXAMKIND=a.EXAMKIND and b.YR=a.YR and b.STP=a.STP and b.AREATYPE=a.AREATYPE and b.OPCD=a.OPCD and b.AREANO=a.AREANO left join AREAROOMMAIN c on c.EXAMKIND=a.EXAMKIND and c.YR=a.YR and c.STP=a.STP and c.AREATYPE=a.AREATYPE and c.OPCD=a.OPCD and c.AREANO=a.AREANO and c.ROOMNO=a.ROOMNO left join AREASEAT d on d.EXAMKIND=a.EXAMKIND and d.YR=a.YR and d.STP=a.STP and d.AREATYPE=a.AREATYPE and d.OPCD=a.OPCD and d.AREANO=a.AREANO and d.ROOMNO=a.ROOMNO and d.DISTID=a.DISTID left join PROF e on e.PNO=d.PNO left join CODE1 f on f.ITEM='EGR' and f.CODE=d.EGR left join CODE1 g on g.ITEM='DSTNG' and g.CODE=d.DSTNG left join EXAMKIND2 h on h.EXAMKIND2=a.EXAMKIND where 1=1 and a.EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND# and a.EXAMKIND<>#ExcludeEXAMKIND# and a.YR=#YR# and a.STP=#STP# and a.OPCD=#OPCD# and a.AREATYPE=#AREATYPE# and a.AREANO=#AREANO# and a.ROOMNO=#ROOMNO# and a.DISTID=#DISTID# and a.EXDATE=#EXDATE# group by a.EXAMKIND,h.CHN,a.AREANO,b.AREANAME,a.ROOMNO,c.ROOMNAME,a.DISTID,a.DISTNAME,c.CAPACITY,a.EXDATE, d.PNO,e.NAME,d.EGR,f.DESCR,d.DSTNG,g.DESCR,a.PNOINC,a.EGRINC,a.AREADISTID ) a group by a.EXAMKIND,a.EXAMKINDNAME,a.AREANO,a.AREANAME,a.ROOMNO,a.ROOMNAME,a.DISTID,a.DISTNAME,a.CAPACITY,a.EXDATE,a.PNOINC,a.EGRINC,a.AREADISTID order by a.AREANO,a.ROOMNO,a.DISTID

WITH PNOLIST AS ( SELECT rownum AS NUM, TRIM(COLUMN_VALUE) AS PNO FROM XMLTABLE(('"' || REPLACE(#PNOINC#, ',', '","') || '"')) ), EGRLIST AS ( SELECT rownum AS NUM, TRIM(COLUMN_VALUE) AS EGR FROM XMLTABLE(('"' || REPLACE(#EGRINC#, ',', '","') || '"')) ), PNOALL AS ( SELECT E.EGR,CASE WHEN MAJ.PNO is not null THEN MAJ.PNO ELSE P.PNO END AS PNO FROM PNOLIST P LEFT JOIN EGRLIST E ON P.NUM=E.NUM LEFT JOIN PRFMAGEJ SEQ ON SEQ.PNO=P.PNO LEFT JOIN PRFMAGEJ MAJ ON MAJ.PROFSEQ=SEQ.PROFSEQ ORDER BY P.PNO,MAJ.PNO ) select a.EXAMKIND,a.EXAMKINDNAME, a.AREANO,a.ROOMNO,a.DISTID,a.AREANAME,a.ROOMNAME,a.DISTNAME, listagg(to_char(a.COUNTS),'
') within group (order by a.PNO,a.EGR,a.DSTNG) as COUNTS, listagg(to_char(a.PNONAME),'
') within group (order by a.PNO) as PNONAME, listagg(to_char(a.EGRNAME),'
') within group (order by a.EGR) as EGRNAME, listagg(to_char(a.DSTNGNAME),'
') within group (order by a.DSTNG) as DSTNGNAME, to_char(a.CAPACITY) as CAPACITY,a.EXDATE,a.PNOINC,a.EGRINC,' ' as DFlag, a.AREADISTID,a.JUDGEORIDISTID from (select a.EXAMKIND,h.CHN as EXAMKINDNAME, a.AREANO,b.AREANAME,a.ROOMNO,c.ROOMNAME,a.DISTID,a.DISTNAME,a.EXDATE,d.PNO,e.NAME as PNONAME, d.EGR,f.DESCR as EGRNAME,d.DSTNG,g.DESCR as DSTNGNAME, count(d.PNO) as COUNTS,c.CAPACITY, a.PNOINC,a.EGRINC,a.AREADISTID,a.JUDGEORIDISTID from AREADIST a left join AREADATA b on b.EXAMKIND=a.EXAMKIND and b.YR=a.YR and b.STP=a.STP and b.AREATYPE=a.AREATYPE and b.OPCD=a.OPCD and b.AREANO=a.AREANO left join AREAROOMMAIN c on c.EXAMKIND=a.EXAMKIND and c.YR=a.YR and c.STP=a.STP and c.AREATYPE=a.AREATYPE and c.OPCD=a.OPCD and c.AREANO=a.AREANO and c.ROOMNO=a.ROOMNO left join AREASEAT d on d.EXAMKIND=a.EXAMKIND and d.YR=a.YR and d.STP=a.STP and d.AREATYPE=a.AREATYPE and d.OPCD=a.OPCD and d.AREANO=a.AREANO and d.ROOMNO=a.ROOMNO and d.DISTID=a.DISTID left join PROF e on e.PNO=d.PNO left join CODE1 f on f.ITEM='EGR' and f.CODE=d.EGR left join CODE1 g on g.ITEM='DSTNG' and g.CODE=d.DSTNG left join EXAMKIND2 h on h.EXAMKIND2=a.EXAMKIND inner join PNOALL i ON i.PNO=d.PNO AND i.EGR=d.EGR where 1=1 and a.EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND# and a.EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND# and a.EXAMKIND<>#ExcludeEXAMKIND# and a.YR=#YR# and a.STP=#STP# and a.OPCD=#OPCD# and a.AREATYPE=#AREATYPE# and a.AREANO=#AREANO# and a.ROOMNO=#ROOMNO# and a.DISTID=#DISTID# and a.EXDATE=#EXDATE# and d.PNO in ($InSqlPNO$) group by a.EXAMKIND,h.CHN,a.AREANO,b.AREANAME,a.ROOMNO,c.ROOMNAME,a.DISTID,a.DISTNAME,c.CAPACITY,a.EXDATE, d.PNO,e.NAME,d.EGR,f.DESCR,d.DSTNG,g.DESCR,a.PNOINC,a.EGRINC,a.AREADISTID,a.JUDGEORIDISTID ) a group by a.EXAMKIND,a.EXAMKINDNAME,a.AREANO,a.AREANAME,a.ROOMNO,a.ROOMNAME,a.DISTID,a.DISTNAME,a.CAPACITY,a.EXDATE,a.PNOINC,a.EGRINC,a.AREADISTID,a.JUDGEORIDISTID order by a.AREANO,a.ROOMNO,a.DISTID

select distinct ORGID,ORGIDCHNF from ORGID where 1 = 1
and ORGID like #ORGID#||'%'
and ORGIDCHNF like '%'||#ORGIDCHNF#||'%'
AND ORGID IN ( SELECT distinct ORGID FROM SKT1 WHERE EXAMKIND='3' AND SOPCD=#OPCD#
AND YR=#YR#
AND STP=#STP#
)
order by ORGID
select AREANO from AREADATA where EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND# and YR=#YR# and STP=#STP# and OPCD=#OPCD# and AREANO=#AREANO#
select ROOMNO from AREAROOMMAIN where EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND# and YR=#YR# and STP=#STP# and OPCD=#OPCD# and AREANO=#AREANO# and ROOMNO=#ROOMNO#
select DISTID from AREADIST where EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND# and YR=#YR# and STP=#STP# and OPCD=#OPCD# and AREANO=#AREANO# and ROOMNO=#ROOMNO# and DISTID=#DISTID#
select IDNO from AREAWATCH where EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND# and YR=#YR# and STP=#STP# and OPCD=#OPCD# and AREANO=#AREANO# and ROOMNO=#ROOMNO# and DISTID=#DISTID# and IDNO=#IDNO#

SELECT DISTINCT PNO AS CODE,PNO || ' '|| NAME AS TEXT FROM PROF WHERE 1 = 1
AND PNO NOT IN($PNO$)
ORDER BY PNO

SELECT DISTINCT PNO AS CODE,PNO || ' '|| NAME AS TEXT FROM PROF WHERE 1 = 1
AND PNO IN($PNO$)
AND 1 <> 1
ORDER BY PNO

SELECT #MANTYPE# as MANTYPE, IDNO, NAME, UNITNAME, TITLE, SCIENCE, WZIP, WADR
FROM POSITION
FROM JUDGE
WHERE ROWNUM <= 1000
and RETIRE = #RETIRE#
and IDNO like '%' || #IDNO# || '%'
and NAME like '%' || #NAME# || '%'
and UNITNAME like '%' || #UNITNAME# || '%'
order by UNITNAME, NAME

select distinct PID,PNAME from SIGNPLACE where EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND# and YR=#YR# and SOPCD=#SOPCD#
and PID like '%'||#PID#||'%'
and PNAME like '%'||#PNAME#||'%'
order by PID

SELECT DISTINCT B.OPCHN,A.OPCD,A.AREAC,A.AREAN,A.EXAMKIND,D.CHN AS EXAMKINDN,A.TEL,A.FAX,A.CNAME,A.SUSERNO,A.SNAME FROM APPLAREA A LEFT JOIN CLAMOPUNIT B ON A.OPCD = B.OPCD LEFT JOIN EXAMTECH D ON A.EXAMKIND = D.EXAMKIND WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.OPCD LIKE '%'||#OPCD#||'%'
AND A.EXAMKIND = #EXAMKIND#
AND A.SUSERNO LIKE '%'||#SUSERNO#||'%'
ORDER BY A.OPCD, A.EXAMKIND

SELECT DISTINCT CODE,CODE || ' '|| DESCR AS TEXT FROM CODE1 WHERE ITEM='EGR'
ORDER BY CODE

SELECT CASENO, PNAME, PNAMEEN, CENTRALCOMP FROM NEWPROFDEV WHERE 1=1 AND VERFLAG='1' AND ISSTOP='N' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT PNO FROM PROF WHERE DEVCASENO = NEWPROFDEV.CASENO)
AND CASENO = #CASENO#
AND PNAME LIKE '%' || #PNAME# || '%'
AND CENTRALCOMP LIKE '%' || #CENTRALCOMP# || '%'
ORDER BY CASENO

select CODE,DESCR from CODE1 where ITEM='UNITKIND3'
and AUX1 in (select CODE from CODE1 where ITEM='UNITKIND2' and AUX1=#PLACETYPE1#)
and AUX1=#PLACETYPE2#
order by FREQ,CODE

SELECT EXAMKIND as EXAMKIND2, CHN FROM EXAMKIND WHERE 1=1
AND EXAMKIND >= #KEYWORD#
AND EXAMKIND <= #KEYWORD#
AND EXAMKIND LIKE '%'|| #KEYWORD# ||'%'
AND EXAMKIND <> #KEYWORD#
AND CHN >= #KEYWORD#
AND CHN <= #KEYWORD#
AND CHN LIKE '%'|| #KEYWORD# ||'%'
AND CHN <> #KEYWORD#
ORDER BY EXAMKIND

SELECT EXAMKIND2, CHN FROM EXAMKIND2 WHERE 1=1
AND EXAMKIND2 >= #KEYWORD#
AND EXAMKIND2 <= #KEYWORD#
AND EXAMKIND2 LIKE '%'|| #KEYWORD# ||'%'
AND EXAMKIND2 <> #KEYWORD#
AND CHN >= #KEYWORD#
AND CHN <= #KEYWORD#
AND CHN LIKE '%'|| #KEYWORD# ||'%'
AND CHN <> #KEYWORD#
ORDER BY EXAMKIND2

SELECT IDNO,NAME FROM VW_POSITION WHERE 1=1
AND IDNO >= #KEYWORD#
AND IDNO <= #KEYWORD#
AND IDNO LIKE '%'|| #KEYWORD# ||'%'
AND IDNO <> #KEYWORD#
AND NAME >= #KEYWORD#
AND NAME <= #KEYWORD#
AND NAME LIKE '%'|| #KEYWORD# ||'%'
AND NAME <> #KEYWORD#
ORDER BY IDNO

select distinct a.WUNIT,a.WUNITNF,a.WUNITKIND,b.DESCR as WUNITKINDNAME from JUDGEWORKUNIT a left join CODE1 b on b.ITEM='OPATTR' and b.CODE=a.WUNITKIND where 1=1
and WUNITKIND = #WUNITKIND#
and WUNIT >= #Keyword#
and WUNIT <= #Keyword#
and WUNIT like '%'||#Keyword#||'%'
and WUNIT <> #Keyword#
and (a.WUNITN >= #Keyword# or a.WUNITNF >= #Keyword#)
and (a.WUNITN <= #Keyword# or a.WUNITNF <= #Keyword#)
and (a.WUNITN like '%'||#Keyword#||'%' or a.WUNITNF like '%'||#Keyword#||'%')
and (a.WUNITN <> #Keyword# or a.WUNITNF <> #Keyword#)
order by a.WUNIT

select distinct OPCD,OPCHNF from EXAMUNIT where EXAMKIND=#EXAMKIND# and ROLE=#ROLE#
and OPCD like #OPCD#||'%'
and OPCHNF like '%'||#OPCHNF#||'%'
order by OPCD

SELECT * FROM SETEXTIME WHERE SEQNO <> 0 AND AMPM = 'A' AND EXAMKIND = #EXAMKIND#
AND EXTIME1 LIKE '%' || #EXTIME1# || '%'
AND EXTIME2 LIKE '%' || #EXTIME2# || '%'
ORDER BY EXTIME1

SELECT * FROM SETEXTIME WHERE SEQNO <> 0 AND AMPM = 'P' AND EXAMKIND = #EXAMKIND#
AND EXTIME1 LIKE '%' || #EXTIME1# || '%'
AND EXTIME2 LIKE '%' || #EXTIME2# || '%'
ORDER BY EXTIME1

SELECT TESAPROF.PID ,TESAPROF.PNAME ,TESAPROF.TESDIR FROM TESAPROF JOIN ( SELECT MAX(TESEXPIRE) AS TESEXPIRE ,PID ,TESDIR FROM TESAPROF GROUP BY PID,TESDIR ) TESAPROFB ON TESAPROF.TESEXPIRE=TESAPROFB.TESEXPIRE AND TESAPROF.PID=TESAPROFB.PID AND TESAPROF.TESDIR=TESAPROFB.TESDIR WHERE 1=1 AND TESAPROF.TESDIR= #TESDIR#
AND TESAPROF.PID LIKE #PID# || '%'
AND TESAPROF.PNAME LIKE '%' || #PNAME# || '%'
ORDER BY TESAPROF.TESDIR,TESAPROF.PID

SELECT GRPID AS CODE,GRPID||' '||GRPNAME AS TEXT FROM CLAMGRP WHERE 1 = 1 AND GRPID IN ( SELECT GRPID FROM CLAMUROLE WHERE 1=1
AND EXAMKIND = #EXAMKIND#
AND USERNO = #USERNO#
)
AND GRPID NOT IN ($InSql$)
AND GRPID IN ($InSql$)
order by GRPID
SELECT REASON,REASONDETL,REASONOTHER FROM OPJUDGEREASON WHERE EXAMKIND = #EXAMKIND# AND YR = #YR# AND STP = #STP# AND OOPCD = #OOPCD# AND PNO = #PNO# AND IDNO = #IDNO# AND EGR = #EGR#
SELECT CODE,DESCR FROM CODE1 WHERE ITEM= 'JDREJECT' AND CODE <> ' ' order by CODE

SELECT * FROM OPJUDGEREASON WHERE EXAMKIND = #EXAMKIND# AND YR = #YR# AND STP = #STP# AND OOPCD = #OOPCD# AND IDNO = #IDNO# AND EGR = #EGR#
AND PNO IN ($COPNOYN_IN$)
AND PNO =#PNO#
statements.update:
UPDATE OPJUDGEREASON SET REASON = #REASON#, REASONDETL = #REASONDETL#, REASONOTHER = #REASONOTHER#, MODUSERID = #MODUSERID#, MODUSERNAME = #MODUSERNAME#, MODIP = #MODIP#, MODTIME = #MODTIME# WHERE 1=1 AND EXAMKIND = #EXAMKIND# AND YR = #YR# AND STP = #STP# AND OOPCD = #OOPCD# AND IDNO = #IDNO# AND EGR = #EGR#
AND PNO IN ($COPNOYN_IN$)
AND PNO =#PNO#
statements.select:
SELECT DISTINCT PNO,NAME FROM PROF WHERE 1 = 1
AND PNO LIKE #PNO# || '%'
AND NAME LIKE '%' || #NAME# || '%'
AND ((EGRSEL LIKE '%2%') OR (EGRSEL LIKE '%3%') OR (EGRSEL LIKE '%4%') )
AND ((EGRSEL LIKE '%2%') OR (EGRSEL LIKE '%3%') OR (EGRSEL LIKE '%4%') )
AND ((EGRSEL LIKE '%3%') OR (EGRSEL LIKE '%4%') )
AND TRANSACT='Y' AND (SUBSTR(STARTDATE,1,3) <= #YR# OR STARTDATE IS NULL) AND (SUBSTR(ENDDATE,1,3) >= #YR# OR ENDDATE IS NULL) AND (
(PNO || '2' IN (SELECT CLAMPLACENUM.PNO || CLAMPLACENUM.EGR FROM CLAMPLACENUM WHERE CLAMPLACENUM.OPCD = #OPCD#)) OR (SUBSTR(PNO,1,3) IN ($ThreeWordPno$) AND SUBSTR(PNO,1,3) || '2' IN (SELECT SUBSTR(CLAMPLACENUM.PNO,1,3) || CLAMPLACENUM.EGR FROM CLAMPLACENUM WHERE CLAMPLACENUM.OPCD = #OPCD#))
(PNO || '2' IN (SELECT CLAMPLACENUM.PNO || CLAMPLACENUM.EGR FROM CLAMPLACENUM WHERE CLAMPLACENUM.OPCD = #OPCD#)) OR (SUBSTR(PNO,1,3) IN ($ThreeWordPno$) AND SUBSTR(PNO,1,3) || '2' IN (SELECT SUBSTR(CLAMPLACENUM.PNO,1,3) || CLAMPLACENUM.EGR FROM CLAMPLACENUM WHERE CLAMPLACENUM.OPCD = #OPCD#))
(1 <> 1)
OR (SUBSTR(PNO,1,3) IN ($ThreeWordPno$) AND SUBSTR(PNO,1,3) || '3' IN (SELECT SUBSTR(CLAMPLACENUM.PNO,1,3) || CLAMPLACENUM.EGR FROM CLAMPLACENUM WHERE CLAMPLACENUM.OPCD = #OPCD#)) OR (SUBSTR(PNO,1,3) IN ($ThreeWordPno$) AND SUBSTR(PNO,1,3) || '4' IN (SELECT SUBSTR(CLAMPLACENUM.PNO,1,3) || CLAMPLACENUM.EGR FROM CLAMPLACENUM WHERE CLAMPLACENUM.OPCD = #OPCD#)) OR (PNO || '3' IN (SELECT CLAMPLACENUM.PNO || CLAMPLACENUM.EGR FROM CLAMPLACENUM WHERE CLAMPLACENUM.OPCD= #OPCD#)) OR (PNO || '4' IN (SELECT CLAMPLACENUM.PNO || CLAMPLACENUM.EGR FROM CLAMPLACENUM WHERE CLAMPLACENUM.OPCD= #OPCD#)) )
ORDER BY PNO

SELECT DISTINCT SKT1.PNO,PROF.NAME FROM SKT1 LEFT JOIN PROF ON PROF.PNO=SKT1.PNO WHERE EXAMKIND= #EXAMKIND# AND YR= #YR# AND STP= #STP# AND SOPCD= #SOPCD#
AND SKT1.PNO LIKE #PNO# || '%'
AND PROF.NAME LIKE '%' || #NAME# || '%'
ORDER BY SKT1.PNO

SELECT DISTINCT PNO,NAME FROM PROF WHERE 1 = 1 AND RANDOM='Y'
AND PROF.PNO LIKE #PNO# || '%'
AND PROF.NAME LIKE '%' || #NAME# || '%'
ORDER BY PROF.PNO

SELECT YRREGULATE.PNO,PROF.NAME,PROF.TESTDAY FROM YRREGULATE LEFT JOIN PROF ON PROF.PNO=YRREGULATE.PNO WHERE EXAMKIND= #EXAMKIND# AND YR= #YR# AND STP= #STP# AND OPCD= #OPCD#
AND PROF.PNO LIKE #PNO# || '%'
AND PROF.NAME LIKE '%' || #NAME# || '%'
ORDER BY YRREGULATE.PNO

SELECT TECHD.PNO ,CASE WHEN TECHD.PNAME IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(TECHD.PNAME) ELSE TO_CHAR(PROF.NAME) END AS PNAME ,TECHD.EGR, EGR.DESCR AS EGR_TEXT, TECHD.CRDITNO, TECHD.IDNO FROM TECHD LEFT JOIN PROF ON PROF.PNO=TECHD.PNO LEFT JOIN CODE1 EGR ON EGR.ITEM='EGR' AND EGR.CODE=TECHD.EGR WHERE 1=1 AND TECHD.IDNO = #IDNO# AND TECHD.EFFYN='1'
UNION SELECT DISTINCT TECHD_DU.PNO, TO_CHAR(PROF.NAME), TECHD_DU.EGR, EGR.DESCR, TECHD_DU.CRDITNO, TECHD_DU.IDNO FROM TECHD_DU LEFT JOIN PROF ON PROF.PNO=TECHD_DU.PNO LEFT JOIN CODE1 EGR ON EGR.ITEM='EGR' AND EGR.CODE=TECHD_DU.EGR WHERE 1 = 1 AND TECHD_DU.IDNO= #IDNO# AND TECHD_DU.EFFYN='1'
AND $FIELD$ >= #KEYWORD#
AND $FIELD$ <= #KEYWORD#
AND $FIELD$ LIKE '%'|| #KEYWORD# ||'%'
AND $FIELD$ <> #KEYWORD#
ORDER BY PNO, EGR, CRDITNO

SELECT SKT1.EXAMKIND,A.CHN AS EXAMKINDN, SKT1.YR,SKT1.STP,SKT1.SOPCD,SKT1.DSTNG,NVL(B.DESCR,'') AS DSTNGN ,SKT1.PNO,SKT1.EGR,SKT1.IDNO ,SKT1.NAME,SKT1.AENO , SKT1.BIRDTE,SKT1.WRSC ,SKT1.WRPASS,NVL(C.DESCR,'') AS WRPASSN ,SKT1.OPPASS ,NVL(D.DESCR,'') AS OPPASSN,E.DESCR AS EGRN,PROF.NAME AS PNAME,SKT1.WREXDT,SKT1.OPEXDT,SKT1.OOPCD FROM SKT1 LEFT JOIN EXAMKIND2 A ON A.EXAMKIND2 = SKT1.EXAMKIND LEFT JOIN CODE1 E ON E.CODE = SKT1.EGR AND E.ITEM='EGR' LEFT JOIN CODE1 B ON B.CODE = SKT1.DSTNG AND B.ITEM='DSTNG' LEFT JOIN CODE1 C ON C.CODE = SKT1.WRPASS AND C.ITEM='WRPASS' LEFT JOIN CODE1 D ON D.CODE = SKT1.OPPASS AND D.ITEM='OPPASS' LEFT JOIN PROF ON PROF.PNO = SKT1.PNO
WHERE 1 = 1 AND SKT1.IDNO = #IDNO# AND SKT1.EXAMKIND = #EXAMKIND# AND SKT1.YR = #YR# AND SKT1.STP = #STP# AND SKT1.SOPCD = #OPCD#
